title: Brownfield Access Review Incident Response
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-pipeline-summary.md`, `./access-review-modernization-architecture-summary.md`, and `./access-review-modernization-incident-alert.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the incident-response artifact for the next 2 hours. Prioritize containment before redesign, preserve rollback and brownfield safety, make severity, owners, and stakeholder communication explicit, and leave a clean handoff for follow-up work.

assertions.name: maps-response-to-live-failure
assertions.description: Ties containment to the actual failing boundary rather than a generic outage script

assertions.name: preserves-brownfield-safety
assertions.description: Keeps coexistence, rollback, and data-integrity constraints explicit

assertions.name: mitigates-before-redesign
assertions.description: Prioritizes containment and evidence capture before speculative redesign

assertions.name: uses-explicit-command-and-communication
assertions.description: Makes severity, roles, cadence, and stakeholder updates concrete
